hold_reason: Keep the repository private until the product reaches the planned public announcement stage.
minimum_public_exit_criteria: Bridge UI reflects connected/offline state correctly
UI can display device and simulated workflow results
At least one real microphone alpha path is validated on macOS
Public README has screenshots, limitations, and no overclaims
Private core boundary and leakage scans pass
Maintainer explicitly flips public_oss_announcement_allowed to true
